svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="hm-dianping-arch" name="系统总体架构图"> <mxGraphModel dx="736" dy="401" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="client-box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F0FE;strokeColor=#4A86E8;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;dashed=0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="320" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="client-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#4A86E8;" value="客户端" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="client-vue" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#4A86E8;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;" value="Vue 3 前端
Access Token (Authorization Header)
Refresh Token (HttpOnly Cookie)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="280" x="60" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow-client-to-interceptor" edge="1" parent="1" source="client-box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=1.5;strokeColor=#666666;" target="interceptor-box"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="interceptor-box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF2CC;strokeColor=#D6A300;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="320" x="40" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="interceptor-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#B8860B;" value="接入层（拦截器）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" x="40" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="interceptor-refresh" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D6A300;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;" value="RefreshTokenInterceptor
令牌校验 → 临期/过期刷新 → 写回响应头" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="280" x="60" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow-interceptor-to-controller" edge="1" parent="1" source="interceptor-box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=1.5;strokeColor=#666666;" target="controller-box"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="controller-box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E6F4EA;strokeColor=#34A853;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="320" x="40" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="controller-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1B7A2B;" value="Controller 层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" x="40" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="controller-items" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#34A853;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;" value="ShopController | UserController | VoucherController
BlogController | FollowController | ShopTypeController" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="280" x="60" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow-controller-to-service" edge="1" parent="1" source="controller-box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=1.5;strokeColor=#666666;" target="service-box"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="service-box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FCE8E6;strokeColor=#EA4335;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="480" x="40" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="service-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#C4170A;" value="Service 业务层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="480" x="40" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="service-auth" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#EA4335;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=9;" value="AuthServiceImpl
✦ JWT 签发/校验
✦ Token 版本号管理
✦ 临期/过期刷新
✦ 验证码消费" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="140" x="60" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="service-shop" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#EA4335;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=9;" value="ShopServiceImpl
✦ 多级缓存查询
✦ GEO 附近搜索
✦ 缓存穿透/击穿防护
✦ 缓存预热" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="140" x="220" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="service-other" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#EA4335;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=9;" value="其他 Service
✦ UserServiceImpl
✦ VoucherServiceImpl
✦ BlogServiceImpl
✦ FollowServiceImpl" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="120" x="380" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow-service-to-cache" edge="1" parent="1" source="service-box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;exitX=0.2;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.2;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=1.5;strokeColor=#666666;" target="cache-box"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow-service-to-db" edge="1" parent="1" source="service-box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;exitX=0.8;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.8;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=1.5;strokeColor=#666666;" target="db-box"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cache-box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F3E8FD;strokeColor=#9334E6;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="320" x="40" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cache-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#7B1FA2;" value="缓存层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" x="40" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cache-caffeine" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#9334E6;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=9;" value="L1 Caffeine 本地缓存
✦ 用户信息缓存（异步刷新）
✦ Token 版本缓存（快速拒绝）
✦ 最大 10000 条，LRU 淘汰" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="280" x="60" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cache-redis" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#9334E6;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=9;" value="L2 Redis 分布式缓存
✦ 商铺数据（逻辑过期）
✦ 空值缓存（穿透防护）
✦ GEO 位置索引 shop:geo:{typeId}
✦ Token/验证码/分布式锁" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="280" x="60" y="710" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lua-note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#FF8F00;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=9;dashed=1;" value="⚡ Lua 脚本原子操作
登录签发 · 过期刷新 · 验证码消费
（合并多次网络往返为单次调用）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="380" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow-service-to-lua" edge="1" parent="1" source="service-box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;exitX=0.7;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.3;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=1.5;strokeColor=#FF8F00;dashed=1;" target="lua-note"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow-redis-to-lua" edge="1" parent="1" source="cache-redis" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;exitX=0.9;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#FF8F00;dashed=1;" target="lua-note"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db-box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8EAF6;strokeColor=#3F51B5;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="200" x="420" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#283593;" value="数据层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="200" x="420" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db-mysql" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#3F51B5;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=9;" value="MySQL 8.0
shop / user / user_info
voucher / voucher_order
blog / blog_comments / follow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="440" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend-box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#999999;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="580" x="40" y="800" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend-text" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontColor=#666666;" value="图例：正常请求流向 → Lua 原子操作 - - → （各层颜色仅用于区分层级）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="580" x="40" y="800" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
